name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORTIF_WALL_CORNER
notes: FORTIF PACK. CONCRETE WALL CORNER: L-section, two runs of 5x Concrete_Wall_EP1 meeting at 90 degrees. Both runs use the HQ 2.2 m overlap pitch (panel dx = 2.574 m engine-measured -> 0.374 m overlap per seam). Corner point sits at (-5.5,-5.5): the X-run's end panel reaches x=-5.687 which is INSIDE the Y-run's wall slab (x in [-6.0,-5.0], panel dy = 1.01 m) and vice versa, so the two runs interpenetrate at the corner - no see-through corner seam. Bounding box is ~11.4 x 11.4 m centered ~(-0.15,-0.15) from the anchor (centered on the anchor within a panel-half). Passive, z=0, dirs 0 / 90 only.
